reviews.comment:
esta en el medio de la nada misma, se paga solo en efectivo, no hay ni señal de celular, lindos paisajes, es para descansar un rato  y seguir.

(Translated by Google)
It's in the middle of nowhere, you only pay in cash, there's no cell phone signal, beautiful scenery, it's a place to rest for a while and then continue.
